summary: Implemented recursive fractal cube-growth wireframe structures (US-066). Created cubeGrowth.ts generator that recursively spawns child cubes on parent faces with noise-driven branching (depth 3-5, probability decreasing per level). All cube instances are merged into single vertex and edge Float32Arrays, normalized to TARGET_RADIUS 2.5. Created fractalGrowthWireframe.ts system following the cubeLatticeWireframe pattern: single LineSegments + Points meshes with shared wireframe shaders, full audio-reactive uniform updates (bass/treble/pointer/palette). Registered 'fractalgrowth' in quality.ts extractSystemConfig (maxFractalDepth clamped to 5), added 'pointcloud+fractalgrowth' compound mode, and wired the system into main.ts rotation and registry. All 1635 tests pass, build succeeds.
